Alisa.title: Bosconovitch Android
Alisa.bio: An android created by the brilliant Dr. Bosconovitch. She fights with chainsaws and thrusters to protect those she loves.

Anna.title: Cold-Blooded Assassin
Anna.bio: The younger, rival sister of Nina Williams. She uses lethal strikes and deception to crush her enemies.

Armor King.title: Evil Flower of the Ring
Armor King.bio: A mysterious masked wrestler who seeks vengeance and thrives in brutal, high-stakes matches.

Asuka.title: Spunky Temple Assistant
Asuka.bio: A hot-headed girl who fights to keep the peace in Osaka. Her defensive counters are second to none.

Azucena.title: Coffee Queen
Azucena.bio: The only daughter of the owner of Ortiz Farm. She fights to promote her family's special coffee blend.

Bryan.title: Harbinger of Chaos
Bryan.bio: A cybernetic zombie cop who lives only for destruction and violence. His heavy punches devastate opponents.

Claudio.title: Banisher of Evil
Claudio.bio: Leader of the Sirius Marksmen. He uses holy starburst energy to purge demonic threats.

Clive.title: Blazing Vanguard
Clive.bio: A mysterious newcomer whose fierce and elegant fighting style keeps opponents guessing.

Devil Jin.title: Dark Angel of Death
Devil Jin.style: Advanced Mishima Karate & Devil Gene Powers
Devil Jin.bio: Jin Kazama consumed by the Devil Gene. He unleashes laser beams and wings of pure darkness.

Dragunov.title: White Angel of Death
Dragunov.bio: A silent military officer who executes cold, calculated grapple moves and heavy strikes.

Eddy.title: Indomitable Rhythm
Eddy.bio: A master of the rhythmic Brazilian martial art Capoeira, combining acrobatic kicks with deceptive dancing.

Fahkumram.title: Titan of Muay Thai
Fahkumram.bio: A towering champion forced to fight to protect his family. His bone-crushing kicks strike with lightning speed.

Feng.title: God Fist
Feng.bio: A martial arts fanatic obsessed with becoming the strongest warrior on Earth.

Heihachi.title: King of the Iron Fist
Heihachi.bio: The legendary patriarch of the Mishima Zaibatsu. His devastating electric attacks strike with god-like power.

Hwoarang.title: Blood Talon
Hwoarang.bio: A cocky Taekwondo master who fights using complex, rapid kick combinations.

Jack-8.title: Ultimate Weapon
Jack-8.bio: The newest model of the Jack series androids. He crushes enemies with high-powered heavy cannons.

Jin Kazama.title: Lightning of Fate
Jin Kazama.bio: A young warrior seeking to destroy the Mishima bloodline and end the Devil Gene curse.

Jun Kazama.title: Light of Hope
Jun Kazama.bio: Jin's mother, who uses pure sacred light and peaceful techniques to purge darkness.

Kazuya.title: Cold-Blooded Overlord
Kazuya.bio: The ruthless CEO of G Corporation. He commands the Devil Gene to annihilate all opposition.

King.title: Anger of the Beast
King.bio: A legendary masked priest who wrestles to support orphans around the world.

Kuma.title: Raging Grizzly
Kuma.bio: Heihachi's loyal pet bear and student. He fights using funny but heavy claw attacks.

Lars.title: Lion of the Rebellion
Lars.bio: Leader of the Yggdrasil rebel army, fighting to bring peace back to the warring world.

Law.title: Legendary Dragon
Law.bio: A martial artist and restaurant owner who fights to pay off his massive debts.

Lee.title: Silver Demon
Lee.bio: An elegant businessman and fighter who values grace and style above all else.

Leroy.title: Grandmaster of Wing Chun
Leroy.bio: A legendary master who cleaned up the streets of New York with elegant rapid punches.

Lidia.title: Prime Minister of Poland
Lidia.bio: A noble leader who fights in the tournament to protect her homeland from G Corporation.

Lili.title: Elegant Heiress
Lili.bio: A wealthy girl who loves street fighting. She views Asuka Kazama as her lifelong rival.

Xiaoyu.title: Dancing Phoenix
Xiaoyu.bio: A cheerful girl who uses agile phoenix stances to evade and strike her opponents.

Nina Williams.title: Silent Assassin
Nina Williams.bio: A deadly assassin and merc who uses lethal locks and quick strikes to eliminate targets.

Panda.title: Pretty Protector
Panda.bio: Xiaoyu's loyal pet panda and bodyguard. She fights using adorable but powerful paw swings.

Paul Phoenix.title: Hot-Blooded American
Paul Phoenix.bio: A tough biker who aims to prove he is the strongest fighter in the universe.

Raven.title: Shadow Agent
Raven.bio: A secret agent who uses advanced shadow clones and ninjutsu to perform tactical strikes.

Reina.title: Purple Lightning
Reina.bio: Meet Reina, the mysterious fighter who uses lightning-quick moves to overwhelm anyone who dares face her. Other than the fact she's a student of the Mishima Polytechnical School, everything else about her is shrouded in mystery.

Shaheen.title: Desert Falcon
Shaheen.bio: A bodyguard who seeks justice and truth behind the suspicious death of his close friend.

Steve.title: Counter-Punching Prodigy
Steve.bio: A world-champion boxer who fights using rapid weaving, slips, and heavy counter-hooks.

Victor.title: Refined Founder
Victor.bio: A classy founder of the UN forces. He uses high-tech active swords, pistols, and teleportation.

Yoshimitsu.title: Space Ninja
Yoshimitsu.bio: Leader of the Manji Clan. He fights using two swords, flying stances, and funny self-healing tricks.

Zafina.title: Stargazer
Zafina.bio: A spiritual protector who sealed the evil spirit Azazel in her left hand to save the world.
